objectiveStatement: Tenant can complete MOVE_IN/MOVE_OUT inspections from /tenant/inspections/:id by filling checklist items + notes, then submit to lock.

constraints.scopeConstraints: No unscoped changes; minimal diffs; demo-critical first.

qualityRequirements.completeness: All required deliverables present and mapped to objective.
qualityRequirements.accuracy: No contradictions; matches known system constraints.
